memoryArtifacts.headline: Page 627. Bulkeley of Cheadle-Bulkeley and Beaumaris. Vol III, 1882. George Omerod
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 627. Vol III. 1882
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.Saint Mary's Churchyard, Cheadle, Greate: 英國英格蘭哈普爾比曉普斯托可聖 馬也斯 亞德
zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Bulkeley於1369年2月22日出生在英國英格蘭爾黑阿德爾時，他的父親William Bulkeley24歲，母親Alice Bostock19歲。他於大約1387年與Margery Venables在英國爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1391年11月11日在英國爾伊頓享年22歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭哈普爾比曉普斯托可聖 馬也斯 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Bulkeley于1369年2月22日出生在英国英格兰爾黑阿德爾时，他的父亲William Bulkeley24岁，母亲Alice Bostock19岁。他于大约1387年与Margery Venables在英国爾黑阿德爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1391年11月11日在英国爾伊頓享年22岁，埋葬在英国英格兰哈普爾比曉普斯托可聖 馬也斯 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Bulkeley was born on 22 February 1369, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bulkeley, was 24 and his mother, Alice Bostock, was 19. He married Margery Venables about 1387, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 11 November 1391, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 22, and was buried in Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Bulkeley est né le 22 février 1369, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bulkeley, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Bostock, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margery Venables environ 1387, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1391, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Bulkeley am 22. Februar 1369 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bulkeley 24 und seine Mutter Alice Bostock 19. Er hat um 1387 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England Margery Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1391 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Eaton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margery Venables circa 1387, nel Cheadle, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 novembre 1391, nel Eaton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 22 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Bulkeleyが1369年2月22日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルで生まれた時，父William Bulkeleyは24歳，母Alice Bostockは19歳であった。約1387年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルでMargery Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1391年11月11日にイギリスチェシュアイアエアトンで22歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアビショプストクサイント マリ'ス チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary's Churchyard, Cheadle, Greate: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 비숍스토크 세인트 마이'스 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Bulkeley(이)가 1369년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체아들일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bulkeley(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Bostock(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1387년 영국 체실르 체아들일에서 Margery Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1391년 11월 11일 영국 체실르 이턴에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 비숍스토크 세인트 마이'스 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.22 Feb 1369–11 Nov 1391: 22 de fevereiro de 1369–11 de novembro de 1391
pt.Saint Mary's Churchyard, Cheadle, Greate: Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Bulkeley nasceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1369, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bulkeley, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Bostock, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Venables aproximadamente 1387, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1391, em Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 22 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Mary's Churchyard, Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary's Churchyard, Cheadle, Greate: сеинт мэри'с чурчярд, бишопсток, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Bulkeley родился 22 февраля 1369 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bulkeley было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Bostock, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Venables около 1387 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 ноября 1391 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 22 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт мэри'с чурчярд, бишопсток, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания.
